latest: Pershing Square makes non-binding unsolicited cash and share proposal at €30.40 per share. Rejected by Board on 29 May

latest: Ennoconn seriously considering crossing 30% threshold and making mandatory offer at €23.50 per share

latest: Indicative proposal at £58 per share from Energy Capital Partners & KKR, rejected by Board. PUSU deadline 10 June 2026.

latest: Multiple approaches from venture capital firms (El Confidencial)

latest: Board rejects €73 per share proposal from Nippon Paint & Sherwin-Williams. Company has already agreed merger with Axalta Coating Systems.
